Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a DECLARE model for a loan application process. We need to add constraints to mitigate bias based on sensitive attributes like ApplicantAge ApplicantGender ApplicantRace

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can add constraints such as coexistence If a decision step occurs for a sensitive applicant ensure a ManualReview activity always coexists response S ManualReview succession ManualReview FinalDecision nonsuccession S FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: response S ManualReview ensures that if S occurs then ManualReview must occur after S chainresponse ManualReview FinalDecision ensures that if ManualReview occurs then FinalDecision must occur after ManualReview

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: coexistence would force ManualReview for all FinalDecision too broad cannot condition on demographics ternary constraints not expressible response ManualReview FinalDecision might force FinalDecision even when not appropriate

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Combined constraints enforce if sensitive check S occurs then S before ManualReview before FinalDecision ManualReview intervenes between sensitive check and decision reducing bias

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - IND
Text: Constraints limit process bias ensure sequence does not discriminate based on sensitive attributes fairness consistency in loan application review

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Use response for each S to ManualReview and chainresponse ManualReview to FinalDecision as best approximation given DECLARE limitations
